DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFF W. LEBLANC, TEL. NO. (909) 949-2226 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. ATTY. LEBLANC INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE OPPOSING PARTY AGREED TO A 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS PACHULSKI STANG ZIEHL & JONES, LLP, RICHARD PACHULSKI AND JAMES STANG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CREDITORS ENTITIES AS CAUSES OF ACTION 5 AND 6 BUT OTHERWISE OVERRULED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
